items.name: ML-Project
items.description: A comprehensive Machine Learning project developed at SDAIA AI bootcamp, focusing on the full ML lifecycle: from problem framing and dataset exploration to feature engineering and model evaluation. This repository showcases applied skills in predictive modeling and the ART (Accountability, Reliability, Transparency) framework.

items.name: OS-PROJECT
items.description: This project presented the design and implementation of an interactive simulation  framework for evaluating page replacement algorithms, with a particular focus on  integrating machine learning into memory management strategies.

items.name: finance-app1
items.description: Build a MERN Finance Dashboard App that has Machine Learning Predictions. The frontend will consist of Vite for our starter application, Redux Toolkit for state management, Material UI for our component library, and Recharts for our Charts. For the backend we will be using Node Js as our runtime, Express Js as our backend framework, and MongoDB for

items.name: China-HUE-Nonlinear-Mechanism
items.description: Interpretable machine learning framework (GBDT + SHAP) to quantify nonlinear threshold effects and path dependence breaking of urban housing utilization efficiency across 103 Chinese cities

items.name: PREDICTING-THE-PRICE-OF-USED-CARS-USING-MACHINE-LEARNING-TECHNIQUES
items.description: This project developed an automated, data-driven framework for estimating the market value of pre-owned vehicles. By moving away from subjective human appraisal, the system utilizes machine learning to provide objective and high-precision financial insights. The model analyzes over 500,000 unique records to understand complex depreciation patterns

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: accelera
items.description: Accelera is a cutting-edge ML pipeline framework . It provides a robust, scalable solution for building and deploying machine learning workflows with optimized performance.

items.name: TerraNova-Disaster-Recovery-Cost-Forecasting-Framework

items.description: Machine learning stock prediction framework using DecisionTree, RandomForest, XGBoost with walk-forward validation on Nifty500 stocks.

items.description: A high-performance data processing engine built with Rust, designed for modern machine learning workflows. Zi provides a unified framework for data quality assessment, cleaning, transformation, sampling, and augmentation with exceptional speed and reliability.

items.name: NeuroWeave
items.description: NeuroWeave is an interactive Cybersecurity Command Center and Adversarial Machine Learning Framework. It simulates live Projected Gradient Descent (PGD) viruses to expose the catastrophic structural vulnerabilities of Neural Networks, while analyzing the mathematical limits of Spatial Sieve defense pipelines.

items.name: Model-Stealing-Detection-System
items.description: A comprehensive research and educational framework for detecting model stealing attempts in machine learning systems. This project demonstrates various detection techniques, defense mechanisms, and evaluation metrics for protecting ML models from unauthorized replication.
